game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **文嘉 (WENJIA):** WENJIA is a 2D side-scrolling platformer where players control a cat-like energy creature, navigating through a series of linear levels to rescue trapped spirits. Players use a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for horizontal movement and a dedicated jump button on the right to traverse platforms and avoid environmental hazards. The core mechanic involves tapping a "World Shift" button to instantly switch between two parallel dimensions: a vibrant "Material World" and an ethereal "Energy World," each featuring unique platforms, obstacles, and enemy placements. Puzzles require precise timing and world-switching to bypass impassable barriers in one dimension by shifting to the other, or to activate specific mechanisms that only exist in a particular world. Progression is level-based, with each of the approximately 30 levels introducing increasingly complex platforming challenges and multi-dimensional puzzles, and the player fails if they fall into a pit or collide with an enemy.
game_info.description: Navigate a mystical cat-like energy creature through dimensional rifts to rescue trapped spirits. Switch between the vibrant Material World and the ethereal Energy World to solve platforming puzzles. Each dimension has unique platforms and hazards - what blocks your path in one world might be your bridge in another. Progress through increasingly challenging levels, but beware: falling into pits or touching enemies means failure. Master the art of dimensional shifting to succeed!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left/Right: Move horizontally
Space: Jump
Z: Shift between Material World and Energy World
Enter: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart and return to start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic movement mechanics and world shifting. Validates that the player can move left/right, jump, and switch between dimensions without errors. Ensures proper collision detection with platforms in both worlds.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Perform a series of movements including walking, jumping, and dimension switching. Test edge cases like jumping while moving and switching worlds mid-jump. Verify the player interacts correctly with platforms in both dimensions.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player successfully moves in all directions, jumps reliably, and switches between worlds. Position updates correctly, and the player lands on platforms without clipping through. No game crashes or state inconsistencies occur.

TEST_1.expected: Player successfully moves in all directions, jumps reliably, and switches between worlds. Position updates correctly, and the player lands on platforms without clipping through. No game crashes or state inconsistencies occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the optimal strategy to complete levels and win the game. Implements intelligent pathfinding that uses world-shifting strategically to bypass obstacles and reach the goal. Validates win condition is properly triggered.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Analyze current level layout and identify optimal path to the spirit. Use world-shifting strategically to navigate around hazards and use platforms that only exist in specific dimensions. Jump precisely to reach higher platforms and avoid enemies.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully completes all levels by reaching trapped spirits. Game transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN state. The AI demonstrates mastery of the core mechanic by using dimension shifts at optimal moments to solve puzzles efficiently.
